onboarding.welcomeText: Food Guide helps you make dietary choices when you have gout, migraine, kidney stones or histamine intolerance. Each food item shows a traffic light with source attribution.
onboarding.chooseConditionsHelp: You can choose multiple conditions. You will only see information relevant to you.
onboarding.disclaimerText: Food Guide provides information to support dietary choices and is not a replacement for medical advice. Scores are based on published guidelines and scientific research, but nutritional science is complex and sources sometimes conflict. Always consult a doctor or dietitian when in doubt.
onboarding.disclaimerAccept: I understand this is not medical advice and will consult a healthcare professional when in doubt.

zoeken.conflictHelp: This food has different advice per condition. See details below.

scan.title: Scan menu
scan.subtitle: Take a photo of a menu or dish for an assessment based on your profile.
scan.disclaimer: The AI analysis is an estimate based on visible ingredients. Preparation methods and hidden ingredients may affect scores. Ask staff if in doubt.
scan.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

instellingen.title: Settings
instellingen.profileHelp: Change your condition(s). Search results and menu scan will adapt.
instellingen.resetConfirm: Are you sure? Your profile and settings will be cleared.
